info.name: CMS - Clinic Management System
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Clinic Management System.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to your API URL (default: https://localhost:7250)
2. Run **Login** request first to auto-set the Bearer token
3. All subsequent requests will use the token automatically

**Test Order:**
Auth → Patients → Doctors → Appointments → Prescriptions → Reports

request.description: UC-22 Main Flow — Login as Clinic Manager. Token is auto-saved to collection variable.
UC-21 ALT-2 — Wrong password should return 401.
UC-21 ALT-1 — Username does not exist.
Edge case — Empty credentials.
Security test — accessing protected endpoint without token should return 401.
UC-01 Main Flow — Register a new patient with all required fields.
UC-01 ALT-1 — Duplicate phone number should be rejected.
UC-01 ALT-3 — Missing required field (fullName).
Edge case — Date of birth in the future should be rejected.
UC-02 Main Flow — Update patient information.
UC-02 ALT-1 — Updating patient with invalid ID.
UC-03 Main Flow — Search patient by name.
UC-03 ALT search — Search patient by phone number.
UC-03 ALT-1 — No results found.
UC-04 Main Flow — View complete patient medical history.
UC-04 — Non-existent patient history.
UC-05 Main Flow — Register a new doctor. Creates UserAccount automatically.
UC-05 ALT-1 — Duplicate email should be rejected.
UC-05 ALT-2 — Duplicate license number should be rejected.
UC-05 — Missing required fields validation.
UC-06 Main Flow — Update doctor profile.
UC-06 — Doctor not found.
UC-08 Main Flow — Set doctor working days/hours (Sun-Thu). DayOfWeek: 0=Sunday, 1=Monday ... 6=Saturday
UC-08 ALT-1 — End time before start time should be rejected.
UC-12 Main Flow — View doctor's appointments for a specific date.

item.name: UC-07 — Delete Doctor (With Active Appointments - ALT-1)

request.description: UC-07 ALT-1 — Run this AFTER booking appointments. Should fail with active appointments error.
UC-07 Main Flow — Run this ONLY after all appointments are cancelled/completed. Removes doctor and UserAccount.
UC-09 Main Flow — Book a new appointment. Date must be a Monday (DayOfWeek=1) based on availability set.
UC-09 ALT-1 — Same doctor/date/time slot (FR-14 conflict check).
Business Rule — Cannot book in the past.

item.name: UC-09 — Doctor Not Available That Day

request.description: UC-09 — Saturday. Doctor has no availability on day 6.
Business Rule — Duration must be exactly 30 minutes.
UC-10 Main Flow — Confirm a Scheduled appointment.
UC-10 ALT-1 — Confirming an already confirmed appointment should fail.
Helper — Book a second appointment to use in reschedule tests.
UC-13 Main Flow — Reschedule confirmed appointment to a new date/time.
UC-13 ALT-1 — Reschedule to past date should fail.
UC-11 Main Flow — Cancel a Rescheduled/Scheduled/Confirmed appointment.
UC-11 ALT — Cancelling an already cancelled appointment should fail.
Helper — Mark appointment as Completed (only Confirmed → Completed).
Helper — Book a fresh appointment for prescription testing.
Helper — Confirm the appointment before creating prescription.
UC-14 Main Flow — Create prescription for a Confirmed appointment. Also marks appointment as Completed.
UC-14 ALT-1 — Second prescription for same appointment should fail (BR-01).
UC-14 — Prescription requires Confirmed appointment (use the cancelled appointmentId).
UC-15 Main Flow — View prescription linked to a specific appointment.
UC-15 ALT-1 — No prescription exists for this appointment.

item.name: 06 - Reports
item.description: UC-17 to UC-19 — Clinic Manager reports

request.description: UC-17 Main Flow — Get clinic dashboard with all KPIs.
UC-18 — Patient report with no date filter (all time).
UC-18 — Patient report for year 2025.
UC-19 — Appointment report with no date filter.
UC-19 — Appointment report for June 2025.
Security — Access reports without token should be denied.
